title: OS X, podman machine time stops sometime (Continued)
body:
### Issue Description

Podman version: 5.8.1
Continued from [11541](https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/11541)
Podman machine falls behind the local time
[#17661 ](https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/17661)
Is said to have fixed the issue by allowing chrony to jump ahead further time, but am still seeing this issue as of today (04.01.2026) 

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Create podman machine
2. Close lid, or sleep mac
3. Open Lid
4. run `podman machine ssh date`
  
restarting podman machine didn't help


### Describe the results you received

Time drift based on amount of time spend suspended. 
12 hours in one case, and 3 minutes in another ( after fixing initial 12 hours)

### Describe the results you expected

Time of machine stays in sync with host machine
